_meta.rationale: Baseline iniziale measurement v2.0 pre-GA (F17 W3 P04 closure). 1000 publish per iteration, tinybench 3.1.0 con warmup + 10 samples. Re-baseline solo con justification commit message + maintainer approval (single-author = self-approval con rationale documentato in commit body).
_meta.hardware: local-dev macOS Darwin 25.4.0 (initial baseline; CI ubuntu-latest produrrà numeri differenti al first run main — re-commit follow-up con CI hardware)
